hooks.command: jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == *.py ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run ruff format "$f" && uv run ruff check "$f" --fix || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == */harness.json ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run python -m tweakcv.seed_prompts || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == */harness.json ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run pytest -q 2>&1 || true; }
jq -r '.tool_input.file_path' | { read -r f; [[ "$f" == */dataset.json ]] && cd "$CLAUDE_PROJECT_DIR" && uv run python -m tweakcv.seed_evals || true; }
